endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Fabric.Admin/fabricLocations/{location}/storageSubSystems/{storageSubSystem}/storagePools
endpoints.description: Returns a list of all storage pools for a location.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{STORAGESUBSYSTEM}} with a real storagesubsystem. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Fabric.Admin/fabricLocations/{location}/storageSubSystems/{storageSubSystem}/storagePools/{storagePool}
endpoints.description: Return the requested a storage pool.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{STORAGESUBSYSTEM}} with a real storagesubsystem. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{STORAGEPOOL}} with a real storagepool.
